## Checklist (per AI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md)
- [ ] DESIGN.md updated with decision (if architectural)
- [ ] E2E test written BEFORE implementation
- [ ] All files ≤100 lines
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Reflection logged (if applicable)

## Type
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] refactor: Code change (no new feature)
- [ ] test: Adding tests
